svg.title: System architecture diagram
svg.desc: Five decoupled modules: classifier.py and fallback.py feed into drift.py, all three feed into api.py, which feeds into dashboard.py. Persistent artifacts (predictions.jsonl, human_queue.jsonl, drift.json) sit at the bottom, written by the API layer and read by the dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the drift module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the classifier module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the fallback module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the API layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the dashboard')
